meta.source: Hana's Directive — 2026-02-24 (FULL REWRITE: pr-split as built-in command)
meta.maintenance: Update status IMMEDIATELY after every sub-task. Deviations logged within plan. NO priorities. NO estimates. ALL tasks MUST be completed.

globalAlerts: UTMOST PRIORITY: osm pr-split as BUILT-IN COMMAND with end-to-end integration tests
DELETE AFTER VERIFIED: scripts/orchestrate-pr-split.js, scripts/bt-templates/claude-mux.js, goals/orchestrate-pr-split.json
ALL three files become a SINGLE embedded JS in internal/command/pr_split_script.js
Rule of Two: NO commits until TWO contiguous, issue-free review cycles (diff vs HEAD)
ALL checks MUST pass on ALL platforms (macOS, Linux via Docker, Windows via moo)
Integration tests MUST use REAL Claude Code via PTY (ollama launch claude)
mandatoryDirectives: Read blueprint.json and WIP.md at session start — trust NO chat history
Update blueprint.json status after EVERY sub-task — the next Takumi reads this cold
Aggressive WIP.md checkpointing as token budget tightens
Die coding — work until the very last token
Expand scope continuously — there is ALWAYS more work

statusSection.currentState: FIXES APPLIED — T001-T033, T044-T045 Done. Awaiting Rule of Two for commit. Then coverage push T034+.
statusSection.buildStatus: ALL GREEN — macOS PASS (verified, all 23 templates tests + 15 pr_split tests pass)

sequentialTasks.task: T001: Create pr_split.go — Go command struct, flags, registration
sequentialTasks.description: Create internal/command/pr_split.go following code_review.go pattern: PrSplitCommand struct embedding *BaseCommand and scriptCommandBase. Flags: --base (default main), --strategy (directory|extension|logical|minimal|auto), --max (default 10), --prefix (default split/), --verify (default make test), --dry-run, --ai, --provider, --model. //go:embed pr_split_script.js and pr_split_template.md. Register in cmd/osm/main.go.

sequentialTasks.task: T002: Create pr_split_template.md — embedded prompt template
sequentialTasks.description: Port promptTemplate/promptInstructions/promptFooter/promptOptions from goals/orchestrate-pr-split.json into Go template Markdown. Support variables: base branch, strategy, file list, classification, plan format.

sequentialTasks.task: T003: Create pr_split_script.js — scaffolding and git analysis
sequentialTasks.description: Port from scripts/orchestrate-pr-split.js: gitExec, shellQuote, dirname, fileExtension, sanitizeBranchName, analyzeDiff, analyzeDiffStats. Pure git operations via osm:exec. Adapt to embedded context (globals from Go). Preserve ALL error handling.

sequentialTasks.task: T004: Port grouping strategies to pr_split_script.js
sequentialTasks.description: Port groupByDirectory, groupByExtension, groupByPattern, groupByChunks, selectStrategy. Include claudemux ChoiceResolver for auto strategy. Preserve scoring and fallback.

sequentialTasks.task: T005: Port split planning and validation
sequentialTasks.description: Port createSplitPlan, validatePlan. Branch names with zero-padding, file sorting, source branch auto-detection, commit prefix, verify default. Validate: no splits, empty, no name, duplicate files.

sequentialTasks.task: T006: Port split execution
sequentialTasks.description: Port executeSplit. Stacked branch creation, file checkout from source, add+commit, SHA recording, error classification (missing/conflict/checkout), branch restore on failure. Critical git write operation.

sequentialTasks.task: T007: Port verification functions
sequentialTasks.description: Port verifySplit, verifySplits, verifyEquivalence, verifyEquivalenceDetailed, cleanupBranches. Tree hash comparison, per-branch verify, detailed diff on mismatch, cleanup.

sequentialTasks.task: T008: Port BT heuristic workflow
sequentialTasks.description: Port createAnalyzeNode, createGroupNode, createPlanNode, createSplitNode, createVerifyNode, createEquivalenceNode, createSelectStrategyNode, createWorkflowTree. BT leaves + heuristic tree composer.

sequentialTasks.task: T009: Port claudemux AI classification
sequentialTasks.description: Port classifyChangesWithClaudeMux + required BT templates from bt-templates/claude-mux.js (spawnClaude, sendPrompt, waitForResponse, readClassification). MCP instance, classification prompt, PTY loop, permission rejection, result reading. FIXED: composite functions restored to original semantics with 3-step sequences.

sequentialTasks.task: T010: Port claudemux AI planning
sequentialTasks.description: Port suggestSplitPlanWithClaudeMux, createClaudeMuxClassifyNode, createClaudeMuxPlanNode, createClaudeMuxWorkflowTree + remaining BT templates (readSplitPlan, spawnPromptAndReadResult, verifyOutput). FIXED: createPlanningActions now has full PA-BT preconditions/effects for backchaining.

sequentialTasks.task: T011: Wire TUI commands and interactive mode
sequentialTasks.description: tui.registerMode: add, diff, note, list, remove, show, copy, set-base, set-group, set-max, run, help. StateVars: baseBranch, groupStrategy, maxFilesPerSplit. Hot-snippets: split-review, split-reorder. postCopyHint, banner.

sequentialTasks.task: T012: Implement 'run' command — full workflow execution
sequentialTasks.description: 'run' TUI command: parse flags, select heuristic or AI BT tree, execute, report. Dry-run shows plan. Non-interactive calls run directly.

sequentialTasks.task: T013: Wire Go Execute() globals and config
sequentialTasks.description: Set JS globals: prSplitConfig (baseBranch, strategy, maxFiles, branchPrefix, verifyCommand, dryRun, aiMode, provider, model), prSplitTemplate. Follow code_review.go pattern.

sequentialTasks.task: T014: Build verification — compiles, help works, basic execution
sequentialTasks.description: 'make build', 'osm pr-split --help', 'osm help' lists pr-split, 'osm pr-split --test' enters/exits. Fix compile errors.

sequentialTasks.task: T015: Unit test — command struct, flags, registration
sequentialTasks.description: pr_split_test.go: valid command, all flags registered, correct defaults, no scriptCommandBase conflicts, appears in help.

sequentialTasks.task: T016: Unit test — analyzeDiff and analyzeDiffStats
sequentialTasks.description: t.TempDir() git repo: correct files, empty diff, missing branch, merge-base failure, diff stats with add/del counts.

sequentialTasks.task: T017: Unit test — all grouping strategies
sequentialTasks.description: groupByDirectory (depth 1/2, single, empty), groupByExtension, groupByPattern, groupByChunks, selectStrategy.

sequentialTasks.task: T018: Unit test — createSplitPlan and validatePlan
sequentialTasks.description: Branch names, zero-padding, file sorting, auto-detect branch. Validate: no splits, empty, no name, dupes.

sequentialTasks.task: T019: Unit test — executeSplit success and failure paths
sequentialTasks.description: Real temp git repo: stacked branches correct, files correct, SHA recorded, restore on error. Failures: invalid plan, checkout failure, missing/conflict classification.

sequentialTasks.task: T020: Unit test — verification and equivalence
sequentialTasks.description: verifySplit pass/fail, verifySplits aggregation, verifyEquivalence matching/non-matching, verifyEquivalenceDetailed diff, cleanupBranches.

sequentialTasks.task: T021: Unit test — BT heuristic workflow end-to-end
sequentialTasks.description: Temp git repo, execute full heuristic BT tree via JS harness. Analysis→grouping→planning→splitting→equivalence all succeed.

sequentialTasks.task: T022: Unit test — TUI commands
sequentialTasks.description: set-base, set-group, set-max handlers. Run flag parsing. Dry-run no git modification.

sequentialTasks.task: T023: Build verification — all unit tests and linters pass
sequentialTasks.description: 'make' (build+lint+test). ALL GREEN. No dead code, aligned structs, no staticcheck/vet warnings, -race passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T024: Integration test infrastructure for pr-split
sequentialTasks.description: pr_split_integration_test.go: TestMain gating (-integration, -provider, -model), skipIfNotIntegration, git repo fixture helper with multi-dir changes. ALREADY EXISTS in integration_test.go.

sequentialTasks.task: T025: Integration test — heuristic pr-split end-to-end
sequentialTasks.description: Gated. Test repo, --strategy directory. Verify branches created, each compiles, tree hash equivalent. No AI needed. IMPLEMENTED in TestPRSplit_EndToEnd_WithCompilation and TestPRSplit_EndToEnd_BTWorkflow_WithCompilation.

sequentialTasks.task: T026: Integration test — AI pr-split end-to-end (FLAGSHIP)
sequentialTasks.description: Gated. --ai --provider ollama --model gpt-oss:20b-cloud. Verify: PTY spawn, MCP tool calls, result parsing, stacked branches, equivalence. MOST CRITICAL TEST. IMPLEMENTED in TestIntegration_FullPRSplitWorkflow.

sequentialTasks.task: T027: Integration test — MCP round-trip, dry-run, error recovery
sequentialTasks.description: Gated. MCP reportClassification/reportSplitPlan round-trip. Dry-run no branches. Error recovery on missing files. Permission auto-rejection. Covered by existing integration_test.go tests.

sequentialTasks.task: T028: Verify osm pr-split discoverable
sequentialTasks.description: 'osm help' lists it, 'osm pr-split --help' shows flags, shell completion includes pr-split, direct invocation works.

sequentialTasks.description: 'make'. ALL GREEN. Deadcode clean. No broken require() paths.

sequentialTasks.description: All flag edge cases, error paths in Execute(), config colors, prompt overrides. 100% line coverage.

sequentialTasks.description: Minimize cross-split deps, balance sizes, detect circular deps, suggest reordering.

finalEnforcementProtocol: BOTH wolves fed: Completion AND Perfection
Rule of Two: TWO contiguous, issue-free reviews before ANY commit
If lost: READ DIRECTIVE.txt → THINK → ACT
Die coding — the next Takumi reads WIP.md
